title: npm 0.9.103 — Entity Helpers & AuthorModel Alignment
body: Version 0.9.103 adds @sharpee/helpers — fluent builders for rooms, objects, actors, containers, and doors. Import the package and call world.helpers() to get started. Also: AuthorModel now implements IWorldModel, and .skipValidation() on any builder handles closed-container placement automatically. 22 packages now on npm.

title: npm 0.9.102 — New @sharpee/media Package
body: Version 0.9.102 is live on npm with 21 packages. The new @sharpee/media package adds typed audio events (SFX, music, ambient), an AudioRegistry for centralizing sound design, variation pools with jitter, ducking, procedural audio recipes, and a fluent AtmosphereBuilder for room soundscapes. See the audio enablement guide for details.

title: WorldModel Refactored
body: WorldModel has been decomposed from 1520 to 1194 lines by extracting three focused subsystems: ScoreLedger, WorldEventSystem, and WorldSerializer. The public interface is unchanged — all 181 engine tests pass without modification.

title: Dungeon 1.0.0 Released
body: The Sharpee port of Mainframe Zork reaches 1.0.0. Weeks of bug fixes, puzzle refinements, and play testing have brought the game to a stable release. Play it now at sharpee.net/play/dungeo.

title: Sharpee Platform Updates
body: A round of cleanup and bug fixes across the platform: capability dispatch fixes, browser build improvements, and build system refinements for independent story versioning.

title: Dungeon Walkthrough Viewer
body: A new interactive walkthrough viewer lets you browse every command, game output, and domain event from a full Dungeon playthrough. Check it out at sharpee.net/walkthrough.

title: Dungeon Port to Sharpee Complete
body: It took about 7 weeks, but Claude and I (and Sharpee) were able to port the 1981 version of Mainframe Zork (aka Dungeon). There may still be bugs, but the golden path works and all unit tests pass.
